label: Prologue1Str
text:
Long ago, King
Tsarkon of Cartahena
unleashed his evil
hordes upon the
peaceful land of
Excalabria.

label: Prologue2Str
text:
Though the people of
Excalabria fought
bravely, in the end
they were overwhelmed.

label: Prologue3Str
text:
As his castle
collapsed around him,
King Erik V of
Excalabria summoned
Blade, his most
trusted servant. Erik
commanded Blade to
escape with Erik's
infant son and the
Ring of Wisdom, an
ancient family
heirloom.

label: Prologue4Str
text:
Blade slipped out a
secret passage as the
castle was engulfed
in flames.

label: Prologue5Str
text:
He fled with the babe
to a distant village
and raised the child
as his own.

label: Prologue6Str
text:
Tsarkon vowed to devote
all of Cartahena's power
to searching for the
Prince. Eighteen years
have passed since Tsarkon
began his search....

label: Outro1Str
text:
Mother, let's go back to
the village where
I was raised.

label: Outro2Str
text:
Yes, let's do that.
You're grown now,
and you've become important.
It's time for
you to visit Blade's grave.

label: Outro3Str
text:
Whenever evil
oversteps its
bounds and
threatens to
engulf the
world, a hero
arises to fight,crback the 
darkness. You
answered the
call this time,
and the balance
between good

label: Outro4Str
text:
and evil has
been restored.
Who will answer
the call next
time? Peace now
reigns 
throughout the
lands ruled by
the Sword of
Vermilion.
You married
your Princess

label: Outro5Str
text:
and rebuilt
Excalabria as
the heart of
your kingdom.
Yet the wise
say that evil
can never be
truly banished.
Always it
reappears in
another guise,
at another
time....

[PLAYER_NAME], at last you are here!

label: MapsHardToFindStr
text:
Maps? Well, they're
pretty hard to find
in these parts.

label: YoureInSwaffhamStr
text:
Why, you're in
Swaffham, traveler!

label: AskKingForGoldStr
text:
If you see the king, ask
him if he can spare some
gold so that we can eat.

raw_ops.text: If you see the king, ask
him if he can spare some
gold so that we can eat.

label: KingGaveRingStr
text:
The king gave you a ring?
That's incredibly generous
for a skinflint like him!

raw_ops.text: The king gave you a ring?

label: KingVeryGreedyStr
text:
Our king is a
very greedy man.

label: CartahenaInvadeSwaffhamStr
text:
Cartahena hasn't invaded
Swaffham yet, but it's
only a matter of time.

label: OldTownRuinsStr
text:
An old town near here is
in ruins. It's been that
way for about 18 years.

raw_ops.text: An old town near here is

label: TreasureNearbyCaveStr
text:
The people here tell
of a treasure that is
hidden in a nearby cave.

label: TaxesHighStr
text:
Taxes in this land are
really high, the better to
fill the king's coffers.

label: StingyKingPeaceStr
text:
Our king may be stingy,
but at least we're at
peace. Thus far, that is.

label: KingNoQueenStr
text:
Our king doesn't want a
Queen because he thinks
she'd spend his money.

label: MinistersQuitStr
text:
Every minister we've ever
had has quit because our
king is so cheap.

label: KingWantsJewelStr
text:
The king really wants
a jewel that's hidden
in a nearby cave.

label: FearCartahenaStr
text:
When you see that ruined
town, you'll know the fear
that Cartahena inspires.

label: TownDestroyedLongAgoStr
text:
A nearby town was
destroyed by Cartahena
a long time ago.

label: TerribleMonsterCaveStr
text:
A terrible monster lives in
a cave near here. Only the
king has a key to the cave.

raw_ops.text: a cave near here. Only the
king has a key to the cave.

label: ThreeCavesToRuinsStr
text:
The ruins? You have
to go through three
caves to get there.

label: ExcalabriaDestroyedStr
text:
Eighteen years ago, the
town of Excalabria was
destroyed by Cartahena.

label: CartahenaDestroyedSwaffhamStr
text:
After you left, the hordes
of Cartahena swarmed over
our walls and destroyed [CONTINUE]
fair Swaffham. Only I
remain; my people have been
killed or driven away. The [CONTINUE]
monsters stole my treasure
and the true Ring of Earth.
Only you can stop them now.[TRIGGERS:4B]\x00I feel that something
strange is going to happen.
I'm not sure what it is.

raw_ops.text: and the true Ring of Earth.
Only you can stop them now.
I'm not sure what it is.

label: SomethingStrangeHappenStr
text:
I feel that something
strange is going to happen.
I'm not sure what it is.

raw_ops.text: I'm not sure what it is.

label: WaitingExcalabriaStr
text:
I've been waiting for you,
This is Excalabria,
Journey to Swaffham and [CONTINUE]
find the Ring of Earth.
Hurry, [PLAYER_NAME]! [CONTINUE]
I have much to tell you
and time is running out!

raw_ops.text: I have much to tell you

label: LongWaitedForYouStr
text:
Long have I waited for you.
This is Excalabria, your
birthplace. I am Knute. [CONTINUE]
I was one of your father's
most loyal servants.
May I see the rings? [CONTINUE]
Oh, no! This Ring of Earth
is a fake! Return to
Swaffham for the true ring.[TRIGGERS:28]Swaffham in ruins?
That is terrible news.
We don't have much time. [CONTINUE]
There are three rings of
good left for you to find,
and Tsarkon has them all. [CONTINUE]
He inherited the Ring of
Power and stole the Ring of
Sun and the Ring of Earth. [CONTINUE]
Now you must hunt
down Tsarkon and wrest
the rings from him. [CONTINUE]
You can get information in
the towns along the way.

raw_ops.text: Long have I waited for you.
I was one of your father's
Oh, no! This Ring of Earth
good left for you to find,
Power and stole the Ring of
Sun and the Ring of Earth.

label: TerribleNewsStr
text:
Swaffham in ruins?
That is terrible news.
We don't have much time. [CONTINUE]
There are three rings of
good left for you to find,
and Tsarkon has them all. [CONTINUE]
He inherited the Ring of
Power and stole the Ring of
Sun and the Ring of Earth. [CONTINUE]
Now you must hunt
down Tsarkon and wrest
the rings from him. [CONTINUE]
You can get information in
the towns along the way.

raw_ops.text: good left for you to find,
Power and stole the Ring of
Sun and the Ring of Earth.

label: GetAllRingsStr
text:
You must have all the
rings! Visit each town one
more time to get the rings.

raw_ops.text: more time to get the rings.

label: SheNeverAnsweredStr
text: She never answered.

label: CannotEnterWithoutPassStr
text:
You may not enter
without a pass.

label: PassGrantsAdmittanceStr
text:
Your pass grants you
admittance to our peaceful
town of Cartahena.

label: ThankYouForBeatingStr
text:
Thank you for beating
that bad man.

label: TsarkonDeadStr
text:
Tsarkon is dead
and we live again!

label: ChangedIntoMonsterStr
text:
I came here to kill
Tsarkon, but he changed me
into a monster. Thank you!

label: ToysForTsarkonStr
text:
We were all merely
toys for Tsarkon.

label: WorldWaitedLongEnoughStr
text:
Hurry! The world has
waited long enough
for this moment!

label: MotherAwaitsStr
text:
Your mother awaits
you in the castle.

label: ServantsAwaitStr
text:
Several servants of
Excalabria await
you in the castle.

label: FreedUsAllStr
text: You've freed us all!

label: MenTurnedIntoMonstersStr
text:
All the men of Cartahena
were turned into
monsters or soldiers. [CONTINUE]
The women were turned
to stone. I hid so
they wouldn't find me.

label: TsarkonFledEastStr
text:
Tsarkon fled as you
approached. He went east,
to the Cave of Thule. [CONTINUE]
I stole the key that you
need to get into the cave.
Here, it is yours.[ACTIONS:SET_TRIGGER]Tsarkon fled eastward,
to the Cave of Thule.

raw_ops.text: I stole the key that you
need to get into the cave.

label: TsarkonFledEastwardStr
text:
Tsarkon fled eastward,
to the Cave of Thule.

label: MustHaveAllRingsStr
text:
I have something to give
you, but first you must
have all the rings.

label: FailedToKillTsarkonStr
text:
I failed to kill Tsarkon.
You had the courage to
do what I could not.

label: WishPoisonKilledStr
text:
You'll soon wish that
the poisoned food I
gave you had killed you![TRIGGERS:F7,E9]Ha, ha, ha!
you'll die![TRIGGERS:F7,E9]\x00So, you are here at last.
Do you remember me?
I am Thar! [CONTINUE]
I asked Tsarkon to turn me
into a monster. Now my
revenge will be sweet![TRIGGERS:F7,EB]\x00Once again we meet, young
fool! It was I, Luther, who
devastated Swaffham. [CONTINUE]
After I kill you, I'm off
to visit Wyclif....[TRIGGERS:F7,EA]Finally, you've come, my
son! I call you that though
I am only your stepfather. [CONTINUE]
Your mother is now my wife.
Join your rings with mine
and we can rule the world![QUESTION:11]Now the world is ours! Let
chaos reign! Everyone can
suffer as I have suffered![TRIGGERS:A1]This will break your
poor mother's heart!
She loves us both. [CONTINUE]
Why not join our family?
Please reconsider![QUESTION:12]Then one of us
will die now![TRIGGERS:F7,EC]You have freed me at last!
Long have I been in thrall
to the forces of evil. [CONTINUE]
As your father and I
collected the rings of
evil, we turned evil. [CONTINUE]
I turned faster than your
father. We tried to fight
it, but it was too late. [CONTINUE]
I killed your father and
wanted to kill myself, but [CONTINUE]
the evil wouldn't let me.
Return to Cartahena, [PLAYER_NAME].
Someone special waits [CONTINUE]
for you there.[TRIGGERS:38]\x00You feel chills, as if
something evil is beside
you, but you see nothing. [CONTINUE]
Perhaps if you possessed
